data.acceptance:
- [ ] End-to-end test suite created and all tests pass
- [ ] Tests verify default workflow uses Loom-defined prompts, not static fallbacks
- [ ] Tests verify claim output is rendered from Loom-defined prompts
- [ ] Tests verify profile-specific output customization affects rendered prompts
- [ ] Tests verify multiple installed workflows function correctly together
- [ ] Tests fail if workflow falls back to non-Loom prompts (with diagnostic output)
- [ ] Tests fail if profile/workflow semantics fail to reach rendered claim prompts (with diagnostic output)
- [ ] Test code coverage maintains 95% minimum threshold
